description: Turn on/off logging. By default this setting is off .

keywords.name: append
keywords.description: Information is added to the end of the log file. This is the default behavior.

keywords.name: truncate
keywords.description: Any existing log file is cleared before new information is added.

keywords.name: append
keywords.description: Information is added to the end of the log file. This is the default behavior.

keywords.name: show-message
keywords.description: Specify the shown state of the messages (i.e., date, time, and other log meta-information) the logging system appends to the log when enabling or disabling logging. By default these messages are appended.

keywords.name: truncate
keywords.description: Any existing log file is cleared before new information is added.
